name: Del Amo Blocc 190 East Coast Crips
description: The Del Amo Blocc 190 East Coast Crips are a predominantly African-American Crip set based in the city of Carson, California, part of the East Coast Crips alliance operating around 190th Street.

sources.title: Del Amo Blocc 190 East Coast Crips — StreetGangs
